items.question: How do you access the value of a --batch-size option?
items.explanation: parse_args returns a Namespace and dashes become underscores.

items.question: Which action defines a boolean on/off flag?
items.explanation: store_true makes the flag True when present, default False.

items.question: How do you restrict an option to a fixed set of values?
items.explanation: choices validates the value and lists options in help.

items.question: What does parse_args() return?
items.explanation: Values are read as attributes of the Namespace.
